# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:latest

# Set the working directory to /go/src/app
WORKDIR /go/src/app

# Copy the current code into the container at /go/src/app
COPY . .

# Run go build to compile the application
RUN go build -o main .

# Expose port 8080 for HTTP traffic
EXPOSE 8080

# Run the binary as a detached process
CMD ["/go/src/app/main"]
